title: erica glandulosa subsp. glandulosa
intro: Erica glandulosa subsp. glandulosa, also known as the heath or bell heather, is a flowering plant species in the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Erica glandulosa subsp. glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
